# Workflow: Validation Review

## Trigger
Post-launch or post-feature

## Objective
Evaluate success

## Inputs
- Metrics
- Feedback

## Outputs
- Insights

## Steps
1. Compare goals vs results
2. Analyze metrics
3. Identify issues
4. Identify wins
5. Document insights
6. Recommend next steps

## Deliverables
- Validation report
